title: Sim: World Cup Manager
description:
202 Nations. One Dream.From footballing giants to rising minnows, all 202 national teams across the globe are here — every confederation, from Europe and South America to Africa, Asia, North America and Oceania. Take charge of your country and begin the journey from your very first match to lifting the ultimate trophy. Every selection, every tactical tweak and every substitution is yours. Do you have what it takes to make a nation world champions?

A Match Engine That Rewards Real TacticsMatches play out with genuine footballing logic. Goals aren't random — a striker's finishing is tested against the keeper's reflexes and the defender's positioning, while your team's quality, shape and form drive the flow of the game. Get your tactics right and you'll see the difference on the pitch.

Work the Sideline — Your Defining MomentsThis is where matches are won and lost. At the key moments — a winger bursting into the box, a striker through on goal, a controversial call from the referee — the action pauses and the decision is yours.

Call the play in real time:Whip in a cross, or thread the through ball

Shoot from range, or run at the defender

Switch the play, or keep possession and probe

Every choice carries its own risk and reward — a cross might win a corner or be cleared; a long shot is safe but rarely beats the keeper; taking your man on could create a goal or give it away.

But here's the twist: your players don't always listen. Every player has a discipline rating, and the more headstrong they are, the more likely they'll wave off your instruction and back their own judgement. Reliable defenders and seasoned veterans follow orders; flair wingers, star strikers and maverick playmakers are a law unto themselves — they might ignore your shout and produce a moment of magic, or throw it all away. Reading and managing those personalities is the heart of the game.

And when a decision goes against you? Take on the referee. Argue aggressively, protest calmly, applaud sarcastically, or bite your tongue — each can sway an official who has his own temperament, from lenient to strict. Get it right and he might just reconsider. Push too far and you'll be the one shown a card.

Command the TouchlineTotal control over how your team plays:

Choose from a wide range of formations — 4-3-3, 3-5-2, 4-2-3-1, 5-3-2 and many more

Set your mentality from Ultra Defensive to Ultra Attack

Fine-tune your approach with strategies like Press High, Offside Trap, Quick Passing, Use Wings, Overlap and Hurry Up

Assign captains, penalty takers and set-piece roles

Adjust everything pre-match, at half time, or live as the game unfolds

Build a DynastyA great manager doesn't just pick the best XI — they build for the future. Develop your nation's next generation through the national youth academy, where rare generational wonderkids can emerge and grow into world-beaters. And success compounds: the higher your nation climbs the world rankings, the stronger the talent coming through your academy — so winning today seeds the dynasty of tomorrow. Manage form, fitness and morale across a long-term career and shape a squad in your own image.

Conquer Every StageCompete across the full international calendar:

The World Cup — the ultimate prize

Continental championships across every confederation

The Nations League

Qualification campaigns, group stages, and knockout drama right down to penalty shootouts

Rotating host nations and authentic tournament structures keep every cycle fresh.

A Living, Breathing Football WorldYour career doesn't play out in a vacuum. The football world lives and breathes around you, delivered through a constant feed of national and world news.

Follow your own nation's story — qualification dramas, VAR controversies, and the headlines that follow your results. Beyond your camp, the wider game churns on: domestic leagues across the globe play out their seasons and crown champions, domestic cups are won and lost, and a continental club competition decides the best side on the planet.

And the transfer market never sleeps. Summer and winter windows open and slam shut on a frantic deadline day, with players moving between clubs — including big-money moves abroad to the top leagues. Your own internationals have club careers of their own, and you'll get the recap of exactly where they landed.

Above it all sits a dynamic world ranking that shifts with every result, as rival nations rise and fall across decades of simulated history — so no two careers ever play out the same way.

Your Story, Your LegacySIM: World Cup Manager is a deep, focused single-player experience built for football fans who love the strategy behind the beautiful game. How will history remember your reign?
description_short: Take charge of your nation from a world of 202 teams and chase international glory. Build your squad, master deep tactics and live sideline shouts, unearth wonderkids in your national youth academy, and battle through the World Cup and Continental Championships in a deep football management sim.
